output.rationale: Table tagged as 'daily' in dbt model config. 3 runs/day matches daily schedule with retries. Safe to cluster.

decision_log.decision: DAILY load frequency — clustering is safe
decision_log.rationale: DBT_MODELS.TAGS contains 'daily'. DBT_RUN_RESULTS shows avg 3 runs/day (consistent with daily + retries). No hourly churn risk.

alternatives_considered.option: Flag as HOURLY based on 3 runs/day
alternatives_considered.reason: 3 runs/day is well below 12 threshold — clearly daily

tool_calls.input: SELECT m.NAME, m.MATERIALIZATION, m.TAGS, COUNT(rr.MODEL_EXECUTION_ID) as run_count_7d, ROUND(COUNT(rr.MODEL_EXECUTION_ID) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('DAY', rr.CREATED_AT)), 0), 1) as avg_runs_per_day FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_MODELS m LEFT JOIN DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS rr ON rr.NAME = m.NAME AND rr.CREATED_AT >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) AND rr.STATUS = 'success' AND rr.RESOURCE_TYPE = 'model' WHERE UPPER(m.DATABASE_NAME || '.' || m.SCHEMA_NAME || '.' || m.NAME) = 'DW.RPT.TRANSACTION' GROUP BY 1,2,3
